title: ocimum albostellatum
intro: Ocimum albostellatum, also known as white thyme basil, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small white flowers and aromatic leaves. The medicinal properties of Ocimum albostellatum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of volatile oils such as thymol and carvacrol. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Ocimum albostellatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine and natural remedies.
